from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

def begin_user_update(session: Session, user_id: int):
    session.begin()
    user = session.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).one()
    return user

def apply_name_change(user, new_name: str):
    user.name = new_name

def commit_user_session(session: Session):
    session.commit()

def rollback_user_session(session: Session):
    session.rollback()

def update_user_profile(session: Session, user_id: int, new_name: str):
    user = begin_user_update(session, user_id)
    apply_name_change(user, new_name)
    try:
        commit_user_session(session)
    except Exception:
        rollback_user_session(session)
        raise
